vocab.meaning: một món đồ quá đắt so với giá trị thật
vocab.example: I saw a designer mirror at the mall, but it was a total rip-off, so I decided to look for a more reasonable option online.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ sang trọng, chất lượng cao
vocab.example: The antique mirror I purchased from the auction has an exquisite frame that is truly fit for a king.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ bầu không khí ngượng ngùng (ở đây là điểm nhấn mở đầu cuộc trò chuyện)
vocab.example: I bought a uniquely shaped mirror for my hallway to break the ice whenever guests enter my home.

vocab.meaning: với ngân sách rất hạn hẹp
vocab.example: When I first moved out, I had to decorate my room on a shoestring, so I bought a simple, second-hand mirror.

vocab.meaning: phần bổ sung làm cho mọi thứ hoàn hảo hơn
vocab.example: The minimalist mirror I found was the icing on the cake for my bedroom renovation; it tied the whole look together.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.example: I saw that vintage mirror on a sale website and bought it in the blink of an eye before anyone else could grab it.

vocab.meaning: để mắt tới/chờ đợi sự xuất hiện của cái gì
vocab.example: I always keep an eye out for interesting mirrors at local garage sales to add to my collection.

vocab.meaning: đáng đến từng đồng (đắt nhưng xắt ra miếng)
vocab.example: Although the smart mirror was quite expensive, its built-in lighting features make it worth every penny.
Mirrors with authentic hand-carved wooden frames are few and far between these days, so I was lucky to find one.

vocab.meaning: chi tiền (thường là một cách cân nhắc)
vocab.example: I'm usually quite frugal, but I was happy to part with my money for a mirror that reflects my personal style so well.
